script.purpose: Hero lockups and one-line brand moments only — Bonheur Royale Spencerian.

display.purpose: Section headlines when script is not used — Fredoka rounded.

body.purpose: Descriptions, admin copy, menu scan text — Nunito Sans max 65ch.

price.purpose: Menu row pricing — always scannable on mobile, never script.

shadows.name: lift-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover only on primary buttons and menu thumbnails — never full rows.

shadows.name: logo-halo
shadows.purpose: Circular logo frame in About — brand exception, not card pattern.

shadows.name: script-coffee-shadow
shadows.purpose: Pink Script headline variant — painted-on-counter effect.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Hero image fade-in; disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Pink Script Headline
components.description: Hero brand line — Frosting Pink with coffee shadow. One line per fold.
components.css: .ds-script-headline { margin: 0; font-family: "Bonheur Royale", "Segoe Script", cursive; font-size: clamp(2.75rem, 9vw, 5.5rem); font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #E8A4B8; text-shadow: 0 1px 0 #2A1F1B, 0 3px 12px oklch(0.28 0.05 55 / 0.35); text-wrap: balance; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA — Ver menú, pedir, admin save.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2.75rem; background: #3D2E28; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 14px 28px; font-family: "Nunito Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; text-decoration: none; border: none; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2A1F1B; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px oklch(0.22 0.012 160 / 0.08); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3A7A5E; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Matcha Button
components.description: Matcha category action — secondary brand voice.
components.css: .ds-btn-matcha { background: #3A7A5E; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 14px 28px; font-family: "Nunito Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-matcha:hover { filter: brightness(0.94); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-matcha:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3D2E28; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Category Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { background: #E8F2EC; color: #3A7A5E; padding: 8px 14px; font-family: "Nunito Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; border: none; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-chip[aria-pressed="false"] { background: #F5F8F6; color: #1A2420; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3A7A5E; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Menu Row
components.description: Signature list item — thumbnail, name, short desc, price. Flat at rest.
components.html:
Galleta S'mores

Bombón, galleta María y Hershey.

$46.00
components.css: .ds-menu-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 16px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #DDE5E1; background: #FFFFFF; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-menu-row:hover { background: #F5F8F6; } .ds-menu-row__thumb { width: 72px; height: 72px; border-radius: 12px; object-fit: cover; flex-shrink: 0; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-menu-row:hover .ds-menu-row__thumb { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px oklch(0.22 0.012 160 / 0.08); } .ds-menu-row__body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-menu-row__title { margin: 0; font-family: "Nunito Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #2A1F1B; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-menu-row__desc { margin: 4px 0 0; font-family: "Nunito Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #5F6B66; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-menu-row__price { font-family: "Nunito Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1A2420; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Admin Text Field
components.description: Admin menu editor — product name or price.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: "Nunito Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field__label { font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #1A2420; } .ds-field__input { padding: 12px 14px; font-size: 1rem; color: #1A2420; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #DDE5E1; border-radius: 6px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-field__input::placeholder { color: #5F6B66; } .ds-field__input:focus { outline: none; border: 2px solid #3A7A5E; padding: 11px 13px; }

components.name: Site Navigation
components.description: Sticky top nav — Menú, Promociones, Nosotros. Brand in Fredoka, not script.
components.html:
The cookie lab
  • Menú
  • Promociones
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 24px; background: #FFFFFF; border-bottom: 1px solid #DDE5E1; font-family: "Nunito Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav__brand { font-family: "Fredoka", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #2A1F1B; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-nav__brand:hover { color: #3D2E28; } .ds-nav__links { display: flex; gap: 24px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav__link { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #5F6B66; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 2px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: #1A2420; } .ds-nav__link--active { color: #1A2420; border-bottom-color: #3A7A5E; }

narrative.overview: The cookie lab se siente como el mostrador de un café-boutique donde la gente se inclina para ver qué hay hoy: cálido, directo, un poco juguetón — pero nunca franquicia. Referencia The Cookie Lab MX — producto real, tono artesanal-contemporáneo; script Spencerian en momentos de marca, sans redondeada para escanear el menú, rosa de marca sobre chocolate profundo.
keyCharacteristics: Mostrador, no vitrina clínica — calidez en tipografía y scrim rosa
Script Bonheur Royale + Fredoka + Nunito Sans
Chocolate + matcha + Frosting Pink como tercera voz
Menú en filas editoriales, no grid de cards
Plano por defecto — sombras solo en hover puntual

rules.name: The Product Carries Warmth Rule
rules.body: Nunca compenses la falta de fotografía con fondos sand/linen/parchment.

rules.name: The Frosting Cap Rule
rules.body: Frosting Pink ocupa ≤12% del viewport en cualquier pantalla.

rules.name: The Matcha Accent Cap Rule
rules.body: Matcha Field ocupa ≤15% del viewport en páginas de menú.

rules.name: The Script Sparingly Rule
rules.body: Bonheur Royale solo en hero, lockup de marca y promos editoriales (máx. una línea).

rules.name: The Menu Scan Rule
rules.body: Title + Price deben leerse en un solo vistazo (<2 s).

rules.name: The Flat Menu Rule
rules.body: Las filas de menú no llevan box-shadow en reposo ni wrapper tipo card.

dos: Do usar fotografía de producto real en hero y thumbnails de menú.
Do reservar Bonheur Royale para una línea de marca por fold — con sombra chocolate si el relleno es Frosting Pink.
Do listar el menú en filas editoriales con precio visible ($46.00).
Do mantener Frosting Pink para identidad (hero scrim, logo halo, promos puntuales).
Do alinear el panel admin a los mismos tokens.
donts: Don't imitar fast food / cadena masiva.
Don't usar script en precios, formularios admin o nav.
Don't usar border-left de acento en filas de menú.
Don't poner gradient text ni glassmorphism decorativo.
Don't repetir eyebrow uppercase tracked sobre cada sección.
Don't convertir el menú en un grid de cards con sombra en reposo.
Don't sustituir fotografía con bloques de color plano.
